report.summary: UX audit of 2 new learn guides (Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage Security), created 7 missing OG images for recent pages, implemented accessibility and semantic HTML improvements across both new guides.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide: Added aria-label to FAQ section for screen reader accessibility, added role='list' semantic structure to FAQ items
Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide: Restyled disclaimer section with amber warning color (#d29922) and warning icon for visual consistency with other guide pages
Cold Storage Guide: Fixed semantic HTML — replaced h2 inside header with div for security warning (was violating heading hierarchy)
Cold Storage Guide: Added role='alert' to critical security warning for screen reader announcement
Cold Storage Guide: Converted TOC from div to nav element with aria-label for proper landmark navigation
Cold Storage Guide: Increased TOC font sizes from 13px to 14px for better readability (minimum 14px per accessibility guidelines)
Cold Storage Guide: Added aria-label and role='list' to FAQ section for accessibility
Updated 3 page metadata references (Polymarket, Scroll, Onchain Identity) to point to correct OG SVG filenames

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: leveraged-tokens-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — DeFi Trading theme with leverage multiplier decorations
OG image: tokenized-treasuries-rwa-yield-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — RWA & Yield theme with bond/treasury visuals
OG image: advanced-staking-strategies-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Staking theme with layered validator bars
OG image: polymarket-prediction-markets-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Prediction Markets theme with probability indicators
OG image: scroll-zkevm-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Layer 2 zkEVM theme with ZK proof symbols
OG image: onchain-identity-reputation-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Identity Web3 theme with ID card and verification elements
OG image: sei-network-parallel-evm-guide (1200x630 SVG) — Layer 1 EVM theme with parallel processing visuals

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Action Required)
items: Styling approach inconsistency noted: Tax-Loss Harvesting uses Tailwind classes while Cold Storage uses inline styles with theme object — both are valid patterns per codebase conventions, no action needed
Both new pages already had OG SVG images created during the build cycle — confirmed present and well-designed
Both pages include proper structured data (Article + FAQ JSON-LD), breadcrumbs, BackToTop, and related resource links
